turnaround_reason: Blue-chip IT research/advisory name down 64% from $445 high to $160 on a fundamental thesis change: AI is structurally disrupting Gartner's subscription-research moat. Contract value growth decelerated from 7% → 5% → 1% over the past three quarters. Generation Investment Management (Al Gore's fund) exited on this exact thesis. Trades at 10.4x forward P/E with $1B+ FCF — cheap if the thesis is wrong, value trap if it's right.
bullish_points: Cash generation remains massive: $1.06B FCF on $10.7B mkt cap = 10% FCF yield
Q1 2026 EPS beat by 14% — execution still works at the operational level
Gartner's own conferences + 1:1 advisor business are not easily AI-disrupted (the events franchise alone is multi-hundred-million revenue)
Buy-side fund repositioning has likely overshot — at 10x forward, expectations are already low
Trading near 52-week low ($139); risk/reward more favorable than it was at $300+
bearish_points: Contract value growth fell from 7% to 1% in two quarters — the deceleration is real, not just optics
Small-tech-vendor client retention in low-70s; this segment is where AI substitution is most severe
Generation Investment exit is a credible signal — they're disciplined long-term holders who explicitly cited AI disruption
Securities-class-action allegations on concealed AI/Federal IT risks — legal overhang
20% short interest — sentiment is firmly bearish; takes longer to inflect
catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings August 4 — first chance to show contract value growth stabilizing or re-accelerating; analyst day signals on AI integration of Gartner's product
suggested_trade: Pass or use a small put-spread to capture asymmetric downside if Q2 contract value goes negative. The valuation is reasonable but the thesis violation (AI disruption) is structural, not cyclical, and turnaround stories take 4-8 quarters to confirm. Better to wait for evidence the contract value bottoms.
key_risk: Q2 contract value goes negative (vs +1% in Q1) — confirms AI is hollowing out the small-vendor cohort; another 30-40% leg down on multiple compression to single-digit FCF yield.
would_skip_if: Q2 contract value declines sequentially; Generation Investment or another quality holder exits publicly; consulting revenue growth stays negative
